sections.paragraph:
with suff. אַתְרֵהּ m. Ch.-

(1) a place, Dan 2:35 Ezr 5:15 6:5 , Ezr 6:7. (In Targg. very frequently; Syr. and Samarit. ܐܬܰܪܳܐ id.) אֲתַר דִּי “the place in which,” Ezr 6:3 by a pleonasm, much used in Aramean ; Syr. ܐܰܬܰܪ ܕ; compare םְקֹום אֲשֶׁר (see מִָקֹום ).

(2) perhaps, track, i.q. Arab. إِْثرُ, أَثَرُ; Ethiop. አሰር፡. Hence בַּאתַר for בַּאֲתַר Dan 7:6, , after; i.q. فى اثر, على اثر in the track; with affix בָּתְרָךְ Dan 2:39. Syr. and Samar. ܒܳܬܰܪ.
